title: Google Just Dropped The Singularity Bomb
summary: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis states humanity may be entering the foothills of the singularity, with AI agents now performing coding, research, and scientific work efficiently. The video aggregates claims about autonomous agents, protein biology models, and mathematical theorem proving, arguing the debate has shifted from AI perfection to practical utility.
